claimText: The Winter Fog Experiment (WiFEX) is led by the Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology under the Ministry of Earth Sciences.
evidenceExcerpt: Led by Indian Institute of Tropical Meteorology under the Ministry of Earth Sciences (MoES).
examUse: Statement-based question identifying the nodal ministry and lead institution for WiFEX.
distractorHooks: Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change (MoEFCC)
India Meteorological Department (IMD) as the lead instead of IITM

claimText: The primary objective of the Winter Fog Experiment (WiFEX) is to develop better now-casting (for the next 6 hours) and forecasting of winter fog.
evidenceExcerpt: Objective: To develop better now-casting (next 6 hours) and forecasting of winter fog.
examUse: Statement-based question on the specific purpose and time-frame (now-casting) of the WiFEX initiative.
distractorHooks: Forecasting of urban smog or particulate matter pollution
Long-term climate modeling instead of now-casting (next 6 hours)

claimText: WiFEX is a long-term open-field experiment focused solely on fog.
evidenceExcerpt: One of the world's few long-term open-field experiments focused solely on fog.
examUse: True/False statement in a multi-statement question regarding the nature of the WiFEX experiment.
distractorHooks: Focused on artificial rain or cloud seeding
